query: I made a simple chicken rice bowl. I cooked 200g raw chicken breast, 60g uncooked white rice, 15ml olive oil, and some soy sauce and spices.
I had a massive smoothie. 1 large banana (120g), 30g peanut butter, 200ml whole milk, and 1 scoop (30g) whey protein powder.
Omelette made with 3 whole large eggs, cooked in 10g butter, filled with 30g cheddar cheese and a handful of spinach.
